architecture_layer: Governed coarse-grained Stage2 wrapper and replay/rehydration entrypoint
function_summary: Run the governed coarse-grained Stage2 path: LLM semantic discovery from cleaned assets followed by deterministic post-LLM completion into the only authoritative Stage2 artifact consumed by Stage3. New writes default to MDEC084 v2 bucket/child naming; explicit legacy run_* creation remains compatibility-only through explicit --run-id. The maintained replay mode may rehydrate both legacy and current live-v2 saved raw responses into completed Stage2 authority without new LLM calls. The maintained path now materializes the explicit candidate-segmentation boundary inside S2-2, preserves the execution-facing full-table authority surface as normalized_table_payloads_v1.json, materializes analysis/table_authority_validation_v1.tsv as the authority-validation surface, then materializes the semantic-facing evidence boundary before prompt assembly. The maintained selector is coverage-first rather than semantic-judging: it performs conservative denoising, minimum evidence coverage, bounded packing, classifies table candidates as must_include/optional_context/hard_drop, keeps must_include summaries in neutral stable order, and preserves a summary-only S2-4a prompt contract with semantic table scoping assigned to the LLM. Dedicated maintained fine-grained execution surfaces also exist for frozen substeps such as S2-4a, S2-4b, S2-5, S2-6, and S2-7.
primary_inputs: explicit run_dir or explicit legacy run_id; scope manifest TSV; optional paper-key subset; source_mode; llm_backend; model; max_text_chars; optional legacy raw-response directory
primary_outputs: RUN_CONTEXT.md; semantic_stage2_objects/candidate_blocks/<paper_key>/candidate_blocks_v1.json; semantic_stage2_objects/normalized_table_payloads/<paper_key>/normalized_table_payloads_v1.json; semantic_stage2_objects/evidence_blocks/<paper_key>/evidence_blocks_v1.json; semantic_stage2_objects/semantic_stage2_v2_objects.jsonl; semantic_stage2_objects/semantic_stage2_v2_summary.tsv; analysis/candidate_segmentation_debug_v1.tsv; analysis/table_authority_validation_v1.tsv; analysis/stage2_prompt_preview_v1.tsv; semantic_to_widerow_adapter/weak_labels__v7pilot_r3_fixparse.tsv; semantic_to_widerow_adapter/weak_labels__v7pilot_r3_fixparse.jsonl
upstream_dependencies: stage1 cleaned text/tables and manifest; extract_semantic_stage2_objects_v2.py; build_stage2_compatibility_projection_v1.py
downstream_consumers: Stage3 relation materialization; Stage2 evaluation; supporting comparison wrappers; fine-grained frozen Stage2 substep replay

function_summary: Emit object-first Stage2 semantic-intermediate artifacts for a declared manifest scope. This is the internal semantic-discovery substep used by the governed composite Stage2 entrypoint, not a separate scope-specific runner. Its maintained replay branch is schema-aware for current live-v2 saved raw responses in addition to older legacy replay payloads. It owns the practical internal substep chain S2-2a candidate segmentation plus execution-grade full-table preservation and conservative table-authority ranking over recovered payloads, S2-2b deterministic evidence-driven semantic-facing evidence selection with a minimal evidence sufficiency floor, and S2-3 prompt assembly, while S2-4a prompt materialization and S2-4b live-call persistence are now exposed separately through dedicated frozen runners. The maintained selector is coverage-first rather than a semantic judge: it only performs conservative denoising, minimum evidence coverage, bounded packing, classifies table summaries as must_include/optional_context/hard_drop, and keeps all LLM-facing table evidence summary-only. Semantic table scoping and semantic primary interpretation are explicitly delegated back to the LLM.
